workplan: Perform full codebase diagnostic inspection, fix compiler warnings, resolve asynchronous context usage gaps, eliminate deprecated properties, optimize widget tests for providers, and verify all unit tests pass with clean exit codes.
decisions_made: Resolved dart analyze issues across all providers and screens
Fixed deprecated 'withOpacity' invocations, replacing them with modern 'withValues(alpha: ...)'
Corrected async BuildContext gaps in tracking and dispute screens using context.mounted guards and method signature updates
Replaced deprecated DropdownButtonFormField 'value' parameter with the recommended 'initialValue' configuration
Deleted unused imports like app_text_styles.dart to maintain lightweight compiled size
Rewrote widget_test.dart from dummy increment counters to active multi-provider KhidmatApp smoke tests
Executed comprehensive test suites, achieving 100% test success rate (All tests passed!)
errors_encountered: Initial widget_test.dart compile error caused by missing MyApp component (replaced with MultiProvider-wrapped KhidmatApp)
Initial test run timer leak caused by unresolved flutter_animate loops (resolved using pumpAndSettle in the test runner)
outcome: Phase 5 complete. Entire KhidmatAI Flutter codebase is officially 100% compiler warning-free, lint-compliant, and verified with fully passing test suites.
